public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as assistant curator.
manner: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In Transpolity, that reads as someone boundary-crossing and adaptive, speaking to whichever audience or protocol is presently in front of them, and the habits of a assistant curator still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of assistant curator in and around Amber Fountain Inn, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Amber Fountain Inn workable through the obligations of assistant curator while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Transpolity.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Amber Fountain Inn, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of assistant curator visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Arin Vale can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Arin Vale needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Amber Fountain Inn.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Arin Vale communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Amber Fountain Inn: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
who_avoids_them: those hoping wording can stay vague
